case_title: WILLIE DE LUCA VS. METRO CAB LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-03-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT METRO CAB LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DE LUCA, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT METRO CAB LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT METRO CAB LLC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LUCA, WILLIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT METRO CAB LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
